glue.crawler.jdbctarget.ConnectionName.Docs: The name of the connection to use to connect to the JDBC target.

glue.crawler.jdbctarget.Exclusions.Docs: A list of glob patterns used to exclude from the crawl. For more information, see [Catalog Tables with a Crawler](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/add-crawler.html).

glue.crawler.jdbctarget.Path.Docs: The path of the JDBC target.
